'''Weggit Arpor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who represented the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate's]] operations within the [[Vergesso Asteroids/Legends|Vergesso Asteroids]].<ref name="guide" />
==History==
Arpor worked for the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]], specifically the distribution department of most of its legal fronts, managing its [[smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations and contracting with smugglers, but also trying to keep them both happy and fearful to remain loyal to their business; a subtle art in which he gained experience through the years. He rose through the ranks of [[Ororo Transportation/Legends|Ororo Transportation]] and rose through its ranks, before transferred to [[Galindas Exports]]'s logistical support.<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

He was transferred to the [[Vergesso Base]], a [[shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] owned by Ororo; [[the Life]] level of the base housed offices for the Galindas branch. His real role was to make sure that the base's leader, [[Nim Zanti]], kept in line with the Syndicate's plans. Officially, he appeared as senior business and operations advisor, enjoying the constant protection of two [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] from the [[Natori Association]].<ref name="guide" />
==Personality and traits==
Arpor resembled a human [[Reptile/Legends|reptile]]; his eyes almost never blinked, and it was difficult to determine his age.<ref name="guide" />

Arpor was completely amoral.<ref name="guide" />
